Description: A strip mall / supermarket located in Guangzhou, China. The building footprint is approximately 52.9 m (east-west) by 44.1 m (north-south), rectangular, with the long axis rotated 270 degrees from north. Total gross floor area is about 3500.0 m^2 spread over 1 floor(s), giving roughly 2333.3 m^2 per floor. Floor-to-floor height is 4.5 m. The building is divided into 14 thermal zones in total (about 9 per floor). Typical space layout: ground: 5 retail units + storage; upper: offices + staff area. Window-to-wall ratio is approximately 40% on exterior walls, with windows distributed on all four facades. Model all zones with appropriate constructions, glazing, occupancy, lighting, equipment and HVAC (ideal loads) so the IDF runs in EnergyPlus without errors.
